name: resend
description: Resend email workflows for agents via CLI skills and MCP tooling.

interface.shortDescription: Send and manage email with Resend
interface.longDescription: Use Resend via both MCP tools and CLI workflows to send emails, manage audiences, domains, broadcasts, templates, and webhooks.
defaultPrompt: Send a transactional email with Resend
Set up and verify a Resend domain
Create and send a Resend broadcast
